task: Using only the embedded packet, compute remaining fatigue cycles for each tank, classify each tank against the provided acceptance thresholds (pressure <= 900 bar, acoustic_hits <= 10, remaining_cycles > 5000), perform validation checks and sensitivity analyses around controlling thresholds, and produce a final decision (pass/warn/fail/needs_review) with justification. Deliver an .xlsx (with formulas/executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the packet, and validation checks) and an acceptance memo (.md) documenting methods, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks, and the final decision table.
